title: Zhar (disambiguation)
content:
'''Zhar''' may refer to:
__NOTOC__
==[[Canon]]==
===Locations===
*'''[[Zhar]]''', an astronomical object located in [[Outer Rim Territories]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Characters===
*'''[[Zhar Lestin]]''', a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who was a member of the [[Dantooine Jedi Enclave Council]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]]

===Creatures===
*'''[[Zharan glass-snake]]''', a creature

===Locations===
*'''[[Zhar system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in the [[Cadavine sector/Legends|Cadavine sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]
**'''[[Zhar system's star]]''', the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the Zhar system
***'''[[Zhar/Legends|Zhar]]''', a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located in the Zhar system

{{Disambig}}

|de=Zhar
}}
